Localization.Description: A Salt command was executed to download a file from the master

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} executed Salt command cp.get_url to download file {object.storage.fullpath} from the master on host {event_src.host}. An attacker can use this command to access sensitive information.

User {subject.account.name} executed Salt command cp.get_dir to download directory "{object.storage.path}" from the master on host {event_src.host}. An attacker can use this command to access sensitive information.
